name: entity-create
description: Declarative entity-creation buttons. Each consuming blueprint declares new_entity_buttons[] in its manifest; installer materializes either a nav_buttons action (kind: nav_buttons) or an injected AccentButton block into a target file (kind: hub). The EntityCreate CustomJS class executes prompts → frontmatter hydration → file create → open. Replaces 7 hand-authored New<X>Button classes across meetings/people/project/scratch/finance. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.47.0): render() consumes customJS.Icons.resolve for kebab-name → SVG translation (fixes BUG-1 from headspace Phase 3); JSON-schema tightens body_template + extra_files[].body_template to basename-only (fixes BUG-3/4 path-resolution mismatch).
